prose: The Fukui reactivity analysis of nitrobenzene was performed using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory in the gas phase (charge 0, multiplicity 1). The calculation identified the atom most susceptible to nucleophilic attack (the most electrophilic site) as Carbon atom 4, with a Fukui index (f+) of 0.49642. The atom most susceptible to electrophilic attack (the most nucleophilic site) was found to be Carbon atom 5, with a Fukui index (f-) of 0.10729. The calculation converged successfully and reported no warnings.
